title: zehneria scabrella
intro: Zehneria scabrella, also known as the Indian prickly choko or prickly gourd, is a type of flowering plant in the Cucurbitaceae family, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Zehneria scabrella include its potential to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The plant can be prepared in herbal forms like teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being.
